_meta.source: Port pin from published coordinates for Great Stirrup Cay (approx 25.833N, 77.900W). Bbox is an approximate hint around the developed area; POI lat/lons not yet sourced — poi_ids intentionally empty pending on-cay GPS data.

port_pin.label: Great Stirrup Cay Welcome Plaza & Pier

bbox_hint.note: Norwegian Cruise Line's private island in the Berry Islands of the Bahamas. Small low-lying cay; the developed cruise area and multi-ship pier sit toward the north, with the historic lighthouse on the south end. Coordinates approximate.

_todo: Populate poi_ids with GPS-sourced points (Welcome Plaza, Great Life Lagoon, Great Tides Waterpark, lighthouse, Silver Cove) once on-cay coordinates are available.
